message:
✨ Replace exact substring EPG search with fuzzy keyword matching (#2)

- Add fuzzy_match.dart utility: tokenizes queries, scores with exact
  substring (1.0) and string_similarity fuzzy (0.5) matching
- Update filteredEntries getter to use fuzzy scoring and sort by relevance
- Wire ManualMappingDialog search box to filter suggestions list using
  same fuzzy approach against epgDisplayName and epgChannelId

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
